items.title: A Look Ahead As Gold Stocks Resume Rally, Broad Market Shakes Off Mini Correction
items.description: Gold stocks, led by GDX, have regained leadership in the market rally, outperforming broad equities during the holiday week.

items.title: U.S. Stocks Stumble: Markets Catch A Cold To Start December
items.description: Both the Nasdaq and S&P 500 saw their first red month since April 2025 in what proved to be a highly volatile trading period.

items.title: November Recap (12/1/2025)
items.description: Nvidia's growth may fuel an S&P 500 bubble burst. Discover why gold, silver, and miners could surge next. Click for my look at where the market may be headed.

items.title: S&P 500 to Hit At Least 7,500-Mark in 2026? ETFs in Focus
items.description: Wall Street sees the S&P 500 hitting 7,500-8,000 in 2026 on AI-fueled earnings growth and rate-cut hopes. ETFs like VOO, IVV and SPY stand to benefit.
